title: Illager Expansion (Archived)
description: An archive of the illager expansion mod, for production please use Illager Expansion [Rematch]
body:
# DO NOT USE THIS IN PRODUCTION

## THIS PROJECT IS STRICTLY AN ARCHIVE

### Please use the updated versions with patches from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-expansion-rematch

Illager Expansion (Archived) is a fork of Illager Expansion. I think it is a great mod and I created this fork as I was sad to find out it had been pulled from everywhere by the original developer. This Mod practically acts as an archive for the original, **there is no changes**. I plan to release an expansion on to it in the future but for now this will just be an archive to download this mod.

Screenshots: *can be found in gallery*

OhDricky is the original developer and they have stated they have no issue in someone else maintaining their mod.

![OhDrickyResponse](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/833939581798711306/977734348411396136/OhDricky_response.jpg)
*screenshot credit: shawn on the Quilt Community Discord*

I am really looking for developers to help maintain and extend this project, I do not have much experience regarding mod development. I just want to make sure people can experience this awesome mod.

**Feel free to use this mod in your modpack however be aware, this mod is provided as is I can not offer support. However GitHub issues and pull requests will be reviewed**
